summary.userFacingImpact: The patch modifies only a development/build version constant (APP_DEV_VERSION) in Config.xcconfig and the provided diff shows no source-code or behavioral changes, so there is no direct evidence in the supplied files of a user-facing behavioral change. However, the supplied sources are limited to this config change and do not prove the absence of any indirect effects; human review is recommended to confirm there are no user-impacting consequences.
